headline: AI and data leader building cost-conscious applied AI for family technology products
title: Head of AI & Data
confidenceNote: Public sources consistently identify Laurynas Rekasius as an AI leader at In Tandem/OurFamilyWizard; title appears as Head of AI & Data on LinkedIn and Director of AI on OurFamilyWizard.
bioMarkdown: Leads applied AI and data work at In Tandem, the parent company behind OurFamilyWizard, Cozi, FamilyWall, and Custody Navigator. His public writing focuses on practical, cost-effective AI deployments, including sentiment analysis, text rewriting, OCR, and fine-tuned LLM systems for sensitive family-technology use cases.
